MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Tim Barrow
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Debra Goshen is present.
Attorney Onki Kwan representing the defendant through limited scope.
Litigants and counsel confer privately in hallway for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
